mission: High-fidelity, industrial-grade website orchestration for mission-critical projects.

content_schema.goal: Explain the specialized project mission through precise headlines and descriptions.
content_schema.rule: Never use generic 'Lorem Ipsum' or 'Standard Company' boilerplate.

settings_schema.definition: Technical tuning controls for animations, structural spacing, and modular feature visibility.
settings_schema.goal: Optimize the architectural pacing and motion strategy to match the product's premium aesthetic.
settings_schema.rule: Selected values must logically match the intensity of the project.

brand_voice: Professional, authoritative, and tactically precise. Prioritizes data over fluff.
